# LLM Metadata for AI Agents

## Description
This repository contains resources for building AI agents and automation tools.

## Tech Stack
- Python
- MCP (Model Context Protocol)
- Claude Code / Codex

## Use Cases
- AI agent development
- Automated tool orchestration
- Multi-agent coordination
